CDISC Definition: Macroscopic examination result codelist (SEND CT bootstrap subset)

CDISC Synonym(s): DISCOLORATION;DISCOLORED;DISCOLORED, RED;DISCOLORED, DARK RED;DISCOLORED AREA;DISCOLORATION DARK, MUCOSA;RED DISCOLORATION;WHITE DISCOLORATION;PALE
CDISC Definition: An abnormal change in color of an organ or tissue
A small area distinguishable from the surrounding tissue
The escape of blood from blood vessels
Abnormal content or consistency of an organ
A closed sac with a distinct membrane
A sunken area on the surface
A pouch or sac branching out from a hollow organ
A dried protective covering over a wound
